messages.message:
Hi Joy Hope you’re doing well!
Just wanted to check in with you — did you get a chance to look through the catalog and see which Reformer models you prefer for the 5 half-tower units?

Once you share the model numbers or screenshots, I can prepare the exact wholesale pricing for you right away.
No rush — just let me know when you’re ready. I’m here to assist anytime!

Hi Joy 
Hope your week is going well!

I just wanted to check in with you — have you had a moment to look through our catalog and see which wood or aluminum Reformer models you prefer for the 5 half-tower units?

Once I know the exact models you like, I can prepare the best wholesale pricing for you and also suggest the options that sell well in the Philippines market.

Take your time — when you’re ready, just send me the model numbers or screenshots.
Happy to support your business anytime!
